The /compile/create API provides a response in the following format:

200 Success

CreateCompileResponse Model - Response received from creating a compile job.
compileId string
example: 5d1f2cba3a0ec7407c566614300502b5-173e0419674daf4144ce7c9931155ca8
Compile Id for a successful build.
state string Enum
The current state of the compile job. Options : ['InQueue', 'BuildSuccess', 'BuildError']
parameters FileParameters Array
List of files and their associated parameters detected during compilation.
projectId integer
example: 23456789
Id of the project you requested to compile.
signature string
Signature key of compilation.
signatureOrder string Array
Signature order of files to be compiled.
success boolean
Indicate if the API request was successful.
errors string Array
List of errors with the API call.
Example 
{
  "compileId": "5d1f2cba3a0ec7407c566614300502b5-173e0419674daf4144ce7c9931155ca8",
  "state": "InQueue",
  "parameters": [
    {
      "file": "__init__.py",
      "parameters": [
        {
          "line": 8,
          "type": "3 LEAN API parameters detected near "self.set_start_date(2024, 1, 3)"."
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "projectId": 23456789,
  "signature": "string",
  "signatureOrder": [
    "string"
  ],
  "success": true,
  "errors": [
    "string"
  ]
}
FileParameters Model
file string
example: __init__.py
Path of the file in the project.
parameters ParameterDetail Array
List of parameters detected in the file.
Example 
{
  "file": "__init__.py",
  "parameters": [
    {
      "line": 8,
      "type": "3 LEAN API parameters detected near "self.set_start_date(2024, 1, 3)"."
    }
  ]
}
ParameterDetail Model
line integer
example: 8
Line number where the parameter was detected.
type string
example: 3 LEAN API parameters detected near "self.set_start_date(2024, 1, 3)".
Description of the detected parameter.
Example 
{
  "line": 8,
  "type": "3 LEAN API parameters detected near "self.set_start_date(2024, 1, 3)"."
}

401 Authentication Error

UnauthorizedError Model - Unauthorized response from the API. Key is missing, invalid, or timestamp is too old for hash.
www_authenticate string
Header
